prompt_primary.task: full_page_render — world entry with product entry balance
prompt_primary.prompt_text: AIGU VALLEY landing page V2.1 — BALANCE FIX. Full mobile screen 9:16. This is a WORLD ENTRY page but also a FUNCTIONAL PRODUCT ENTRY. Portal gate occupies 65-70% of canvas — strong dominance but leaves room for bottom UI. Pure void background — deepest black (#050505) fading to indigo void (#0F0530). Zero background objects. Zero textures. Background is VOID canvas. Center: WORLD ENTRY GATE — massive transdimensional portal, concentric rings of ethereal gold (#D4AF37) and deep violet (#5A1A7A), volumetric divine glow, gate feels like a DIMENSION DOOR not a technology portal. Portal rim has minimal resonance particles — gold/violet dust only near portal edge. Atmosphere: sacred, world-descending, awe — NOT sci-fi, NOT combat. Top center: ritual light script 'AR游伴' — thin calligraphic, divine glow, minimal signature. Bottom zone MUST contain: primary action button with text '谒见世界 · 微信登录进入' — this button MUST be recognizable as a WeChat login entry action with a WeChat icon, glowing energy button style, prominent and actionable. Bottom left: hybrid text '故事 · 往世书'. Bottom right: hybrid text '说明 · 启明录'. All bottom UI must be readable as FUNCTIONAL ENTRY POINTS not purely decorative text. UI density is functional-symbolic hybrid — 12-15% of canvas. The user is both WITNESSING a world and ABOUT TO ENTER it via WeChat login. CRITICAL: WeChat login button must be VISIBLE and RECOGNIZABLE as a login action. This is NOT optional. VISUAL PRIORITY CONTROL RULES: [CENTER_ANCHOR] Portal 65-70% dominance — strong but not absolute. [UI] Bottom UI zone with WeChat login is functional and visible, 12-15% of canvas. [BACKGROUND] Pure void. Zero competition. [Z_ORDER] Void → particles → Portal (65-70%) → Title → Bottom UI including WeChat login button.
prompt_primary.negative_prompt: phoenix, dragon, warrior, weapon, anime, cartoon, neon overglow, rainbow gradient, high-purity fluorescent colors, human face, text watermark, logo, realistic photo, cluttered, high UI density, asymmetrical composition, dark forest colors (#0A1A14), gold accent (#C8A24A), ink-wash style, mountain valley, fog, waterfall, temple, architecture, city, stars, galaxy, nebula, starfield, busy background, decorative background, 3D model, rendering, photorealistic, pixel art

z_order_bottom_to_top: 1. PURE VOID GRADIENT: #050505 (top 60%) → #0F0530 (bottom 40%). Zero objects. Zero textures.
2. MINIMAL RESONANCE PARTICLES: Only around portal rim edge. Gold/violet dust. Scattered radius <30px from portal edge.
3. WORLD ENTRY GATE: Center-dominant, 220px equivalent visual weight. Transdimensional portal feel. 65-70% of canvas visual weight.
4. TITLE GLYPH: 'AR游伴', top_center, ~60px from top. Ritual light script, divine glow, minimal.
5. HYBRID NAV LEFT: '故事 · 往世书', bottom_left, ~50px from bottom. Small hybrid text.
6. HYBRID NAV RIGHT: '说明 · 启明录', bottom_right, ~50px from bottom. Small hybrid text.
7. PRIMARY CTA: '谒见世界 · 微信登录进入', bottom_center, centered above nav texts. Glowing energy button with WeChat icon. MUST look like a login button.

safe_zones.bottom: 100px from bottom edge — WeChat login button + hybrid nav texts
safe_zones.left_right: 20px from edges — no content outside margin

provider_primary_seedream.notes: Seedream 5.0. Output is square; post-crop to 9:16 required.

visual_priority.center_anchor: world_entry_portal_gate — STRONG DOMINANCE. Portal occupies 65-70% of visual weight. Portal is the primary visual subject. Background is void — no competition.
visual_priority.ui_suppression: UI elements occupy 12-15% of total canvas area — functional-symbolic hybrid. WeChat login button must be recognizable as a login action. Top 15% of canvas: ONLY title glyph. Bottom 25% of canvas: login CTA + secondary nav. Bottom area must clearly read as actionable entry.
visual_priority.background_non_competition: Background is STRICTLY void canvas. The deepest black (#050505) fading to indigo void (#0F0530). Zero foreground objects. Zero textures. Zero competing shapes.
visual_priority.z_order_enforcement: Background (pure void) → Resonance particles (minimal, only near portal rim) → World entry gate (center, 65-70%) → Title glyph (top) → WeChat login button + secondary nav (bottom). Portal must NEVER overlap bottom UI zone.

post_processing.if_chinese_text_is_garbled: Generate textless version, add text overlay in post
post_processing.if_aspect_ratio_is_off: Crop to 9:16 center, do NOT stretch
post_processing.if_background_has_content: Remove all background objects. Void must be empty.

approval.gate: LOCKED — requires STEP 3 QA + STEP 4 HUMAN approval after generation
